channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: LabourList: 'Healey and Carns are gone. Labour must finally get serious about national security'
item.description: 'Healey and Carns are gone. Labour must finally get serious about national security'

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘I’m not going away,’ says Keir Starmer despite defence secretary’s exit
item.description: ‘I’m not going away,’ says Keir Starmer despite defence secretary’s exit

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending decisions
item.description: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending decisions

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reeves grudgingly resorts to departmental salami slicing to fund UK defence budget
item.description: Reeves grudgingly resorts to departmental salami slicing to fund UK defence budget

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Seeing various reports that Kevin Lee could be AB’s chief of staff. Don’t think that’s right, fwiw. Also not sure it’s right that Burnham wouldn’t touch Mahmood’s immigration reforms. Would be surprised, not least giv...
item.description: Seeing various reports that Kevin Lee could be AB’s chief of staff. Don’t think that’s right, fwiw. Also not sure it’s right that Burnham wouldn’t touch Mahmood’s immigration reforms. Would be surprised, not least giv...

item.title: BBC Politics: Troubles' legacy bill 'unfit for purpose' says ex-minister
item.description: Troubles' legacy bill 'unfit for purpose' says ex-minister

item.title: LabourList: National security was meant to be Keir Starmer's strength. Now it's become a liability.
item.description: National security was meant to be Keir Starmer's strength. Now it's become a liability.

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer 'not going to walk away' from leadership
item.description: Starmer 'not going to walk away' from leadership

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Prime minister says it’s his ‘duty’ to continue as leader after two allies quit in defence spending row
item.description: Starmer latest: Prime minister says it’s his ‘duty’ to continue as leader after two allies quit in defence spending row
